## Skill Name

<!-- Which Skill? e.g., pm-prd, pm-comp, pm-rice -->

## Problem Type

<!-- Select one -->

- [ ] Output Quality — Skill output doesn't meet expectations
- [ ] Routing Error — Wrong Skill was triggered (or should have triggered but didn't)
- [ ] Methodology Missing — Skill lacks a specific PM methodology or framework
- [ ] Format Issue — Output structure, template, or formatting problem
- [ ] Enhancement — Suggestion for improving an existing Skill

## Description

<!-- What happened? What did you expect? -->

### Actual Output

<!-- Paste the Skill output or describe what went wrong -->

### Expected Output

<!-- What should the Skill have produced? -->

## Environment

<!-- Help us reproduce the issue -->

- **Model**: <!-- e.g., deepseek-v4-pro, claude-sonnet-4, gpt-4o -->
- **Provider**: <!-- e.g., DeepSeek, Anthropic, OpenAI -->
- **PM Copilot Version**: <!-- e.g., v0.2.7 -->
- **Input**: <!-- Paste the exact message you sent -->

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — Produces incorrect/misleading PM deliverable
- [ ] Major — Missing important content or wrong structure
- [ ] Minor — Formatting or style issue

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or references -->
